title: Medito
blurb: A genuinely free, non-profit meditation app — no paywall, no ads. Courses, sleep, and daily practices.

title: Healthy Minds Program
blurb: Completely free, research-backed training in awareness, connection, insight and purpose. From a non-profit.

title: UCLA Mindful
blurb: Free guided meditations in many languages from UCLA Health's mindfulness program.

title: Smiling Mind
blurb: Free mindfulness app from an Australian non-profit, with programs for all ages including kids.

title: Insight Timer
blurb: Enormous free library of guided meditations, talks and music. A paid tier exists but the free content is vast.

title: Clear Fear
blurb: Free CBT-based app to manage anxiety and fear, from the UK charity stem4.

title: Free CBT worksheets & tools
blurb: A large free library of CBT self-help worksheets, thought records and audio for anxiety, depression and more.

title: Woebot (where available)
blurb: A free CBT-based chatbot for mood and anxiety support. Availability varies by region.

title: CBT-i Coach
blurb: Free, evidence-based app for insomnia built around CBT-I, from the US Dept. of Veterans Affairs.

title: PTSD Coach
blurb: Free, evidence-informed app with coping tools for trauma and PTSD symptoms. From the VA.

title: Mindfulness Coach
blurb: Free guided mindfulness training app from the US Dept. of Veterans Affairs — open to everyone.

title: 7 Cups
blurb: Free, anonymous emotional support from trained volunteer listeners, 24/7, plus community.

title: Plum Village
blurb: Free app of guided meditations, talks and bells in Thich Nhat Hanh's tradition.

title: Wysa (free tier)
blurb: AI-based self-help chatbot with CBT and mindfulness tools; a meaningful free tier is available.
